memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Seigneur de l'Aigle.  Slain at Hastings; may have been a companion to William the Conqueror.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORMAN%20NOBILITY.htm#RicherLaigledied1176A as of 3/14/2016 …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Engenoulf, seigneur of Laigle son and heir.
memoryArtifacts.description:
Engenoulf, seigneur of Laigle son and heir. 

So named in the Roll of Battle Abbey, though Wace names him Enguerrand, and Orderic Vitalis as Euguenulf. It was natural for Engenoulf and his descendants …

zh.L'Aigle, Orne, Duchy of Normandie, Franc: 法國諾門迪奧內利艾格爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Engenulf de l'Aigle於1010年出生在法國諾門迪奧內利艾格爾時，他的父親Fulbert de Beine30歲，母親Richeride of Normandy27歲。他於大約1032年與Richeroeda在法國諾門迪奧內利艾格爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1066年10月14日在英國英格蘭素可海斯廷斯享年56歲，埋葬在英國素可海斯廷斯。

zh-hans.L'Aigle, Orne, Duchy of Normandie, Franc: 法国諾門迪奧內利艾格爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Engenulf de l'Aigle于1010年出生在法国諾門迪奧內利艾格爾时，他的父亲Fulbert de Beine30岁，母亲Richeride of Normandy27岁。他于大约1032年与Richeroeda在法国諾門迪奧內利艾格爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1066年10月14日在英国英格兰素可海斯廷斯享年56岁，埋葬在英国素可海斯廷斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: l'Aigle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Gotthilf.
German: variant of Faigl, a southern short form of Veilchen, the name of the flower violet.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Engenulf de l'Aigle was born in 1010, in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Fulbert de Beine, was 30 and his mother, Richeride of Normandy, was 27. He married Richeroeda about 1032, in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 October 1066, in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Hastings, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Engenulf de l'Aigle est né en 1010, à L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Fulbert de Beine, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Richeride of Normandy, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Richeroeda environ 1032, à L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1066, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Engenulf de l'Aigle 1010 in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulbert de Beine 30 und seine Mutter Richeride of Normandy 27. Er hat um 1032 in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich Richeroeda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1066 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hastings, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Engenulf de l'Aigle è nato il nel 1010 nel L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Fulbert de Beine, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Richeride of Normandy, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Richeroeda circa 1032, nel L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 ottobre 1066, nel Hastings, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Hastings, Sussex, England.

ja.L'Aigle, Orne, Duchy of Normandie, Franc: フランスノーマンディオルンル'アイグル
ja.lifeSummary: Engenulf de l'Aigleが1010年にフランスノーマンディオルンル'アイグルで生まれた時，父Fulbert de Beineは30歳，母Richeride of Normandyは27歳であった。約1032年にフランスノーマンディオルンル'アイグルでRicheroedaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1066年10月14日にイギリスイギリススセックスハスティングズで56歳で死去し，イギリススセックスハスティングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Engenulf de l'Aigle(이)가 1010년 프랑스 노먼디 른 '아익일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulbert de Beine(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Richeride of Normandy(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1032년 프랑스 노먼디 른 '아익일에서 Richeroeda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년 10월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 하스틴그스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 하스틴그스에 묻혔다.

mn.Hastings, Sussex, Anglo-Saxon England: Hastings, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Engenulf de l'Aigle nasceu em 1010, em L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Fulbert de Beine, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Richeride of Normandy, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Richeroeda aproximadamente 1032, em L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1066, em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Engenulf de l'Aigle родился в 1010 г. в местности л'еигл, орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Fulbert de Beine было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Richeride of Normandy, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Richeroeda около 1032 г. в местности л'еигл, орн, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 октября 1066 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Engenulf de l'Aigle nació en 1010, en L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Fulbert de Beine, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Richeride of Normandy, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Richeroeda aproximadamente 1032, en L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1066, en Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra.
